title: DevClient Tools
description: DevClient Tools is a lightweight client-side modpack with QoL features and tools for developers. Includes NBT viewer, resource pack inspector, and utilities for building and plugin testing.
body:
# 🛠️ DevClient Tools – Lightweight QoL & Developer Utility Pack
DevClient Tools is a purely client-side modpack tailored for players and developers who want a cleaner, more efficient Minecraft experience — without altering core gameplay. Whether you're building, testing server plugins, or simply playing with enhanced clarity, this pack provides the tools you need without adding unnecessary bulk.

## 🔍 Developer-Oriented Features
### Component Viewer
> Component Viewer is a mod for Minecraft Java Edition that allows you to view and copy components of any item stack.

### My Resource Pack, My Choice
> This mod can be used to give you full control over server resource packs. It allows you to ignore, re-order or just partially apply server packs, giving you full control, which parts of the pack you want to use.

_Side Note: This mod can also help you as a developer to create systems to restrict the client-side denial of required server resource packs._

### View Server Resources
> A Minecraft mod that allows you to preview server resource pack URLs before downloading them

### Axiom
> Axiom is a powerful all-in-one Minecraft editing tool that combines real-time previews, client-side rendering, and an intuitive interface to streamline and enhance building.

### ViaFabricPlus
> Minecraft Fabric mod which allows you to join EVERY Minecraft server version (Classic, Alpha, Beta, Release, April Fools, Bedrock)

## 🌿 General QoL Improvements
In addition to developer utilities, the pack includes various client-side quality-of-life mods that improve visuals, usability, and comfort while playing—ideal for players who want a smoother and more customizable experience without modifying gameplay mechanics.
